conditions.evidence_text: At the critical point of PMMA (73 vol% MEK/27 vol% cyclohexane) a complete separation of the elution zones of PMMA and PS is achieved. ... for PMMA regardless of its molar mass one retention time is obtained corresponding to Ky=1 for all molar masses.
conditions.analyte_polymer: PMMA, PS, PVC, PCHMA, poly(styrene-co-acrylonitrile), poly(styrene-co-methyl methacrylate)
conditions.detector: Waters differential RI detector R401, Knauer u.v./vis. filter photometer
conditions.notes: Used for separation of blends where PMMA is one component. Other components elute in size exclusion mode.
